headline: Assessing DaVita (DVA) Valuation After Earnings Beat Buyback Debate And EPS Guidance Questions
summary: DaVita (DVA) is back in focus after recent results showed earnings outperformance and revenue growth. This has lifted investor sentiment while raising fresh questions about its buyback heavy capital allocation and future earnings guidance. See our latest analysis for DaVita. At a share price of $150.05, DaVita’s recent 90 day share price return of 43.63% and year to date share price return of 31.04% point to strong momentum, even though the 1 year total shareholder return of 0.55% is flat...
